_note: Brazil arabica weather-analog forecast. Mahalanobis on 24-dim (rain, temp, rain_anom, SPI z, SPEI z, ONI) × 4 phenology stages. Detrended production residuals. Walk-forward backtest. Bootstrap 95% CI on ensemble.
production_seed_note: Plumb in real CONAB safra series via a scraper. Until then, this seed is good enough for analog ranking.
